title: chamaemelum mixtum
intro: Chamaemelum nobile, also known as Chamaemelum mixtum, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is commonly known as chamomile or Roman chamomile. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chamaemelum mixtum include reducing anxiety and insomnia, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among others. Chamaemelum mixtum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil for its therapeutic uses, although it is recommended to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
